generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor, providing motor shaft angle r_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder placed behind the gearbox, providing gearbox output angle r_out"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C11: Data instances
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle r_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output angle r_out streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor input current I_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

// C11: Engineering and simulation models
instance MotorSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition diagram of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance GearboxSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition diagram of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance RotationalFlowSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram describing rotational energy flow across motor and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of friction‑free behavior of the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Dahl friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing LuGre friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntime
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used to stream live sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                 VisualizationDashboardService,
                 ParameterExtractionService,
                 ModelUpdateService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell linking model data, parameters and services"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterExtractionService,
                 ModelUpdateService
]

instance SimulinkRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment hosting simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                 ModelUpdateService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction coefficients for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing measured vs. simulated torque τ and angular velocity ω"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extraction of friction parameters for model‑based motion control and controller update"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance ModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous updating of simulation models using newly streamed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeviationInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extraction of static, kinetic and viscous friction coefficients from live data"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured vs. simulated torque and angular velocity on the dashboard"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feedback of identified friction parameters to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations between measured data and simulation, triggering model refinement"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in real‑time, continuously ingesting live sensor streams and updating DataTraces on‑the‑fly to support online friction identification. Although exact sampling rates are not specified, the architecture is described as a 'real‑time, data‑driven' representation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A one‑way architecture where the physical robot (PT) feeds sensor streams to a processing component that consumes the data, runs Simulink friction models, and produces simulated data traces; the resulting digital shadow aggregates measured and simulated traces and is displayed in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital‑shadow is employed during the operational (run‑time) stage of the robot to continuously identify friction and adjust control parameters."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability from each DataTrace to its originating sensor and processing component; comparison of simulated friction‑free and friction‑included models against measured torque/velocity to validate model accuracy; continuous re‑identification to account for wear, temperature, and load variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor streams are transmitted over MQTT; the Asset Administration Shell provides meta‑information linking data traces to the underlying models."
]
